prompt: Use the Google logo depicted in the first reference image to influence the structure of the provided second reference astronomical image of a nebula. Reinterpret the logo as a repeating, tessellated pattern woven into the nebula’s gaseous clouds, with the ‘G’ shapes subtly defining the nebula’s filaments. Enhance the nebula’s glow to emphasize the ‘G’ pattern, creating a mystical, geometric celestial scene.
prompt_refined: Generate a new photorealistic image of a nebula by reinterpreting the structure of the nebula from image 2. Incorporate the 'G' logo from image 1 as a repeating, tessellated pattern that forms the gaseous clouds and glowing filaments of the nebula. The individual 'G' shapes should subtly define the nebula's dense regions and intricate structures. Enhance the overall luminosity and internal glow of the nebula to emphasize this geometric 'G' pattern throughout, creating a mystical celestial landscape.
